title: Request for Extended Evaluation / Rebuttal of Feasibility Denial
body:
Date: {{date}}

To: Assigned Vocational Rehabilitation Counselor (VRC)
VA Regional Office

Subject: Request for Extended Evaluation / Rebuttal of Feasibility Denial (38 C.F.R. § 21.57)
Veteran: [Your Name]
Case Status Stage: {{stage}}

Dear Counselor,

I am writing to formally rebut the determination that it is not reasonably feasible for me to achieve a vocational goal under Chapter 31 due to the severity of my service-connected disabilities.

I hold a disability rating of {{ratingPercentage}}. My proposed vocational goal is {{proposedGoal}}.

Under 38 C.F.R. § 21.57, the counselor should resolve reasonable doubts in favor of the veteran regarding feasibility. If there is doubt, the VA may authorize an Extended Evaluation under 38 C.F.R. § 21.74 to assess my capability rather than issuing a feasibility denial.

I have medical support (Doctor Letter Available: {{hasDoctorLetter}}) indicating that with reasonable accommodations, I can successfully pursue training and employment in my proposed field.

I request that my file be placed in Extended Evaluation status to formally evaluate my feasibility over a structured period.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
